title: Temple Roll On | Calming Lavender & Eucalyptus Essential Oil for Sleep Improvement, Rest & Relaxation, Aromatherapy (10ml)
features: SUPPORTS A BETTER NIGHT'S SLEEP: Sleepzzz Well is made to help encourage a calmer bedtime routine and a more restful night. Use it before bed when switching off feels difficult and improving sleep quality is the goal.

LAVENDER ESSENTIAL OIL: Lavender is known for its soft, soothing scent that helps create a restful mood before bed. It is ideal for quiet evenings, helping the bedtime routine feel calmer, gentler, and more relaxing.

EUCALYPTUS ESSENTIAL OIL: Eucalyptus brings a fresh, clearing aroma that helps bedtime feel more calming and settled. It is lovely to use in the evening when the mind feels busy and a more peaceful wind down is needed.
CALMING BEDTIME RITUAL: Sleepzzz Well Temple Roll On helps turn busy evenings into calmer moments before bed. Apply to temples or wrists when winding down with a book, soft music, or a warm bath.

IMPROVING SLEEP QUALITY: Created to support improving sleep quality, this blend helps encourage a more settled bedtime routine. Use it shortly before sleep when the mind feels busy after work or travel.
CALMS YOUR SENSES: The gentle aroma helps calm your senses and create a more peaceful mood at bedtime. It is especially useful after long days, tense evenings, or before an early morning start.

TEMPLE ROLL ON COMFORT: The roll on applicator keeps things quick, neat, and fuss free right before bed. It is perfect for bedside tables, overnight bags, or those evenings when a simple routine feels best.

DRIFT INTO REST: Sleepzzz Well helps create a softer end to the day with a calming scent and easy application. Keep it close for those evenings when switching off feels hard and drifting into rest needs a little help.
EASY TO APPLY: Simply glide onto the temples, wrists, or soles of the feet shortly before bedtime. It fits neatly into nightly routines and works well whether at home, away, or staying with family.
COMPACT AND HANDY SIZE: The small size makes this temple roll on easy to keep close at hand. Pop it on a bedside table, in a handbag, or in an overnight bag for calm wherever the night takes you.
description: Product Description Sleepzzz Well Temple Roll On is a simple little bedtime companion designed to help the evening feel calmer, softer, and more settled. Blended with lavender and eucalyptus essential oils, this handy roll on is made for those moments when the day still feels loud and sleep feels just out of reach. A quick swipe onto pulse points before bed helps create a soothing ritual that encourages rest and relax time, whether the mind feels busy, the body feels tense, or the evening just needs a gentler pace. This temple roll on is ideal for winding down as part of a nightly routine. The therapeutic blend of essential oils is chosen to help calm your senses and support improving sleep quality in a natural, easy-to-use way. Apply it to the temples, wrists, or soles of the feet shortly before bedtime and let the comforting aroma help ease nervous tension, stress, and irritability. It is especially handy after a long day at work, during restless evenings, before an early start, or whenever switching off feels harder than it should. The compact roll on format makes it easy to keep by the bedside, tuck into an overnight bag, or carry when staying away from home. Sleepzzz Well is all about creating a small but meaningful bedtime moment that helps signal it is time to slow down. With jojoba seed oil and a calming aromatic blend, it glides on easily and turns a simple step into a more peaceful part of the night. For anyone looking for essential oils with a practical roll on applicator, this soothing temple roll on is a lovely way to drift into rest and wake up feeling more refreshed. Ingredients Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Eucalyptus Oil, Limonene, Linalool
